imgCredit: The ruins of the temple of the sun, Palmyra - Carl Haag
name: Lost in the sands of time
description:
They arrived in the dead of the night, scaring the nightwatch out of their wits. Some forty bandits and their %GENDERED2[king|queen]%GENDERED2, armed to the teeth but surprisingly affable sought an audience with the camp's leader. %HisR2 majesty of the sweeping dunes has come to collect taxes after hearing about someone actually bothering with excavating the old plateau and its dusty rubble. %HeR2 has no interest in supplies, or %PERSON_NAME's water, only what %he might've dug up from %hisR2 land.

With a hearty grin the rotund royalty then clarifies that %heR2 wants whatever Gold has been found, but your agent is not entirely sure how %hisR2 majesty can make the distinction between what was found, and what %he brought here...

choices.name: Submit to the search
choices.description: Your Agent loses ALL of %his Gold. Exploration Percentage is increased by 20%. Rummaging the tents. Peering in all the containers. They even drum the waterskins for odd clinks...

choices.name: The only metals found here are steel and the taste of iron
choices.description:
[Requires: Agent has a minion and Might 4]

Your Agent gains 30 XP and loses 4 HP.
Exploration Percentage is increased by 20%.

outcomes.description:
%PERSON_NAME knows combat and while forty bandits and their portly pretend monarch are a daunting number to face, they're also an awkward one to maneuver in here. Amidst the rubble %PERSON_NAME retreats into, an all on one melee turns into a gauntlet of duels. %MULTI[Keeping to the shadows and looping around architecture %he's grown familiar with over the month,|Swinging, weaving, stabbing and blocking, throwing sand in the eyes and biting the hands that grab,|Fighting with inhuman rage, your agent tears through the foes like paper. With their formation broken,]%MULTI eventually their numbers are halved at which point their leader wisely cuts their losses and orders a retreat.

There is nothing in the rubble that's worth this steep a price, they'll later reason to themselves, bitterly and incorrect.

%PERSON_NAME gains 30 XP and loses 4 HP.

choices.name: Utterly outmatched
choices.description:
[Requires: The Survivor, The Baroness, The Warlord, or Agent has a minion and Might 4]

Your Agent gains 30 XP.
Exploration Percentage is increased by 20%.

outcomes.description:
The forty bandits and their portly pretend monarch would be a daunting force to face for any mortal, but in addition to being an awkward number to maneuver in here, they face %PERSON_NAME on %his ground. Amidst the rubble %PERSON_NAME retreats into, an all on one melee turns into a slaughter. %MULTI[Keeping to the shadows and ambushing the fearful warriors one by one,|Swinging, weaving, stabbing and blocking, throwing men around left and right,|Fighting with an inhuman strength, your agent tears through %his foes like paper. With their formation broken,]%MULTI eventually their numbers are halved at which point their leader wisely cuts their losses and orders a retreat.

There is nothing in the rubble that's worth this steep a price, they'll later reason to themselves, bitterly and incorrectly.

%PERSON_NAME gains 30 XP.
